SenderNotAllowedToUseHandle(bytes32,addr.notice: Returned if the sender is not allowed to use the handle.

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain

cancelOrder(uint256).notice: Cancel an open order. Returns locked amount to escrow.

createOrder(address,address,bytes32,byte.notice: Submit a sealed FX order. Locks the encrypted amount in escrow.

deposit(address,uint64).notice: Deposit ERC-20 tokens into encrypted escrow.         The deposit amount is public (ERC-20 transfer), but your         escrow balance is encrypted from this point on.

escrowBalance(address).notice: Get your encrypted escrow balance. Only you can decrypt.

getDailyLimit(address).notice: Get your encrypted daily limit. Only you can decrypt.

getDailySpent(address).notice: Get your encrypted daily spend. Only you can decrypt.

matchOrders(uint256,uint256).notice: Match two compatible orders using FHE.         Order A: sells tokenX for tokenY at rateA         Order B: sells tokenY for tokenX at rateB         Compatible if rateA * rateB >= RATE_SCALE^2 / 1e6         Settlement: min(amountA, amountB) transferred each way.

setDailyLimit(address,bytes32,bytes).notice: Set an encrypted daily spending limit for a token.

withdraw(address,uint64).notice: Withdraw tokens from escrow.         Deducts from encrypted balance. If insufficient, the deduction         is a no-op (FHE select). Check your balance after.

userdoc.notice: Sealed-bid cross-border FX matching via FHE.         Users deposit ERC-20 tokens which are held as encrypted internal         balances. Orders, matching, and settlement all operate on encrypted         values — the blockchain never sees the amounts.
